method:
Simplest Way I Turn My SaaS Demos Into Real Users (Small workflow that started working for me) Simplest Way I Turn My SaaS Demos Into Real Users (Small workflow that started working for me)

In the mo

stages.task: Scrape Reddit/IndieHackers/Twitter for threads where people describe the exact pain point each deployed app solves
Score leads by urgency (asking for solution NOW vs venting), match to our deployed apps, filter out competitors
Generate personalized demo links with UTM tracking, post helpful replies linking to free tool, log outreach
Check demo engagement analytics, flag high-intent users (3+ visits, feature usage), queue for follow-up
